positive: Minimalist abstract scene featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette against a deep twilight gradient sky. The mountain range should consist of several overlapping, sharply defined, geometric shapes in muted terracotta and navy tones. Include subtle, scattered constellation elements (small glowing stars) above the peaks. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for a round apparel print. Use a strong, flat graphic style with high contrast. Dramatic backlighting gives a clean, crisp edge to the silhouettes. Vector illustration quality, negative space optimized, highly decorative, print-ready.
